title: trixis flexuosa
intro: Trixis flexuosa, also known as "cabeça de velho" or "old man's head," is a plant species in the Asteraceae family, commonly found in tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trixis flexuosa include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as wounds and eczema. Trixis flexuosa can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion for medicinal purposes, and its leaves and roots are often used in herbal remedies.
